title: Command Cockpit Lane Selector Compression
summary: Let the new lane-level selector replace duplicate Cockpit rail chrome so more money-path levels fit before scrolling.
proof: Added tested Command Cockpit CSS that tightens lane card height, padding, portraits, title spacing, and selector cells.
Hid the old progress bar and muted summary only in the Cockpit lane rail because the selector already exposes level, XP, gates, wins, and live work.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the compression unlock.
